calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; George Kasolas appearing via zoom for Petitioner Joan Myers.
Endy Ukoha-Ajike appearing via zoom for Objector Fredrick J. Myers.

Mr. Kasolas stated that the Huntington Drive property is the only asset of the estate, that he is unaware of any furniture of value, and that he believes the furniture has been thrown away. Mr. Kasolas also stated the property in Napa is not a part of the estate, and that he believes the property was in litigation with one of the children. Mr. Ukoha-Ajike presented oral argument to support his client's position with respect to Mrs. Myer only having a life estate and that she was expected to create a will so that the property passes to the grandchildren. The Court read language of the will and states life estate is not an issue. Mr. Kasolas stated that he believes that Mr. Flynn is not requesting any fees in this matter and that he has never communicated with Mr. Constantino, and that Mr. Flynn was involved with the Napa matter. In addition, Mr. Kasolas stated that Judge Quinn indicated at a prior hearing that the will clearly passes the property to Joan and that the Court already adjudicated that Mr. Ukoha-Ajike client is not a beneficiary. The Report of Executor on waiver on account etc., was taken under submission with the Courts intent to overrule and grant the petition.

Judge: Stephen Murphy.Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: H. Singh. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-08-2023 Continued To Apr-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Endy Ukoha-Ejike, via Zoom, for Frederick J. Myers, Petitioner.

The Accounting Petition filed by Joan M. Myers in this matter had been pre-granted by the court. Counsel above appeared to advise that he objects to the court's tentative ruling. The court shall continue this matter to Apr-05-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 to allow counsel to file formal objections and provide notice as needed.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-22-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-22-2022 Off Calendar

Petition To Remove Executor Of Estate; Points And Authorities; Declarations In Support
Off Calendar Nov-22-2022 Off Calendar

Petition To Remove Executor Of Estate; Points And Authorities; Declarations In Support
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Continued To Nov-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Endy Ukoha-Ajike, via Zoom, for Frederick Myers, Petitioner; George Kasolas, via Zoom, for Joan Meyers, Objector.

Mr. Kasolas reports that the City and County of San Francisco's (CCSF) complaint regarding the real property has resolved and closed by the CCSF and that he intends to file a Petition for Final Distribution soon. Mr. Ukoha-Ajike offers advocacy to keep his petition on calendar and reports that he is likely to file a response to Mr. Kasolas' petition once it is filed. After additional discussion, the court advises that it will be granting a short continuance of this matter to allow Mr. Kasolas to file his petition for final distribution. The court advises that it intends to continue the two instant petitions to the date shown below. The same petitions will be continued from that date to the date provided by the court for the petition for final distribution.

The subject matters are continued to Nov-22-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status on the Filing of a Petition for Final Distribution is added for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Continued To Nov-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-06-2022 Continued To Nov-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Executor Of Estate; Points And Authorities; Declarations In Support
Off Calendar Sep-06-2022 Continued To Nov-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Endy Ukoha-Ajike appeared by zoom for Petitioner.

Mr. Ukoha-Ajike stated that he and opposing counsel have been having conversation, that Mr. Kasolas is out of town and that he asked him to specially appear on his behalf and request a continuance to the end of October. The court questions whether any progress has been made on cleaning up the property. Mr. Ukoha-Ajike indicated that Mr. Kasolas stated that his client is going to do what she needs to do. The Petition to Remove Executor of Estate, etc. is continued to November 1, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
